name: cta
description: A closing call-to-action band: a centred eyebrow, heading, subtitle and up to two CTAs on a solid accent panel — the last push before the footer. The panel fills with the primary token and inks with primary-foreground, so it re-themes with your brand. Content reveals on mount and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion; CTAs stack on mobile and sit inline from sm up.

notes: The heading renders as an h2 that labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby, so it slots under a page h1 without breaking the heading order
CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons, so each is keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible
The decorative radial wash on the panel is aria-hidden and the CTA colours are chosen to pair with primary-foreground for contrast on the fill
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a closing call-to-action section for a landing page
an accent CTA band with a headline and buttons
a conversion prompt built on ibirdui
examples: <Cta title="Ready to ship faster?" primaryAction={{ label: 'Get started', href: '/docs' }} />
